title: fix prod-mentolder kustomize merge error for website-config
description:
## Summary
- `prod-mentolder/kustomization.yaml:17` was using `configMapGenerator` with `behavior: merge` on `website-config`, but `website-config` is a raw ConfigMap defined in `k3d/website.yaml` and deployed via the separate `task website:deploy` envsubst pipeline — it's never part of the kustomize tree. The merge silently never worked; CI on main has been red since `6af2f539`.
- Move `BRETT_INTERNAL_URL` into the templated `website-config` ConfigMap in `k3d/website.yaml` so envsubst resolves `${WORKSPACE_NAMESPACE}` per env (mentolder=`workspace`, korczewski=`workspace-korczewski`). Removes the broken kustomization block and three orphan patch files (`prod/patch-brett-configmap.yaml`, `prod/patch-brett-internal-url.yaml`, `prod-korczewski/patch-brett-configmap.yaml`) — none of them were referenced from any kustomization.

## Test plan
- [x] `task test:all` (exit 0, no failures — was failing on `prod kustomize build` since 6af2f539)
- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone prod-mentolder` (OK)
- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone prod-korczewski` (OK)
- [x] envsubst on `k3d/website.yaml` yields `BRETT_INTERNAL_URL=http://brett.workspace.svc.cluster.local:3000` for mentolder and `http://brett.workspace-korczewski.svc.cluster.local:3000` for korczewski
- [ ] Post-merge: `task feature:website` rolls website on both clusters; verify `kubectl get cm website-config -o jsonpath='{.data.BRETT_INTERNAL_URL}'` returns the per-namespace URL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)
